javax::microedition::io::Connection Interface Reference

Inheritance diagram for javax::microedition::io::Connection:

Public Member Functions

void close () throws IOException

Detailed Description

Represents the interface of the most basic type of generic connection. Only the close method is defined. No open method is defined here because opening is always done using the Connector.open() methods.

Definition at line 30 of file Connection.java.
